content: Voice server uses Kokoro TTS with numeric voice IDs 1-41. Voice ID 1 is af_heart (warm default). Empty voice_id uses default voice.

description: Voice server rejected notifications without voice_id with error: Invalid voice_id. Available voices: marrvin, marlin
resolution: Modified notification-queue.ts to skip validation when voice_id is empty - uses default voice instead

name: Voice ID Migration
description: ElevenLabs voice IDs (20-char alphanumeric) must be migrated to Kokoro numeric IDs (1-41) for voice server compatibility
